channels.label: Police Control Room, Kavaratti
channels.source_name: Lakshadweep Police - Contact Us
channels.note: Independently confirmed on two official sources: the Lakshadweep Police 'Contact Us' page ("Police Control Room (Kavaratti): 04896-263100") and the Lakshadweep Disaster Management Authority emergency contacts table (row 19, Kavaratti, 'Police Control', '04896 - 263100'). Email: phq-ctrlroom-lk[at]nic[dot]in

channels.label: Lakshadweep Police - official website
channels.source_name: Lakshadweep Police (official site)
channels.note: Live and fetched. Publishes the officer directory, control room numbers, LGMS grievance system and links to the CCTNS citizen portal.

channels.label: Lakshadweep Police Citizen Portal (CCTNS) - online FIR, missing persons, stolen property
channels.source_name: Lakshadweep Police (official site) - Citizen Portal / CCTNS link
channels.note: CAVEAT: published by the official police site (which links it as "http://citizen.lakshadweeppolice.gov.in" for online FIR filing, arrested/wanted persons, missing persons and stolen/recovered property), but I could NOT load it - the TLS certificate has expired, so browsers will show a security warning. Verified only via the linking page, not the portal itself. Consider flagging or withholding until the cert is renewed.

channels.label: Superintendent of Police, Kavaratti (office)
channels.source_name: Lakshadweep Police - Contact Us
channels.note: Confirmed on the police 'Contact Us' page ("04896-262258 (O)") and on the UT portal's Police Department page ("04896262258"). DISCREPANCY: the lakshadweep.gov.in department directory lists the SP as 04896-262273; two of three official sources give 262258, so 262258 is used here. Email: lak-sop[at]nic[dot]in

channels.label: Administration of Lakshadweep - official UT portal
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep (official portal)
channels.note: The official state/UT portal homepage. Also publishes the helpline block used for several entries here.

channels.label: Islands directory (Lakshadweep's equivalent of a district listing)
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep - Islands
channels.note: IMPORTANT CONTEXT: Lakshadweep has NO district directory because the entire UT is a single district - the administrative setup page states "The entire Union Territory of Lakshadweep is considered as one district." This islands page is the nearest equivalent: it links to a dedicated page for each of the 11 islands (Agatti, Amini, Andrott, Bangaram, Bitra, Chetlat, Kadmat, Kalpeni, Kavaratti, Kiltan, Minicoy). There are no separate per-district websites.

channels.label: Administrative setup - districts, sub-divisions and blocks
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep - Administrative Setup
channels.note: Confirms one district, 10 sub-divisions and 5 community development blocks (HQ at Kavaratti, Amini, Andrott, Minicoy, Kiltan). Links to Subdivision & Blocks, Village Panchayats, Judicial Setup and Constituencies pages.

channels.label: Department contact directory, UT of Lakshadweep
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep - Directory
channels.note: Official contact details of departments functioning under the Administration of UT of Lakshadweep.

channels.label: Office of the Administrator, UT of Lakshadweep
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep - Office of the Hon'ble Administrator
channels.note: Lakshadweep is a Union Territory WITHOUT a legislature and has no Chief Minister, therefore no CM Helpline exists - this is the head-of-administration office, the nearest equivalent escalation point, NOT a helpline short code. Do not present it as a CM helpline. Alternate: 04896-262497. Email: lk-admin[at]nic[dot]in. Corroborated by the LDMA emergency contacts page ("04896-262255/ 262497 - Administrator").

channels.label: Electricity grievances - Department of Electricity, UT of Lakshadweep
channels.source_name: Department of Electricity, UT of Lakshadweep (POWERLAK consumer portal)
channels.note: Independently confirmed on two official sources: the POWERLAK consumer portal ("04896-263709") and the lakshadweep.gov.in homepage helpline block ("Electricity Grievances: 04896-263709"). Nodal officer email: lk-ktelect[at]nic[dot]in

channels.label: POWERLAK - electricity consumer portal (bills, new connections, complaints, CGRF)
channels.source_name: Department of Electricity, UT of Lakshadweep (POWERLAK)
channels.note: Official Department of Electricity consumer portal. Offers online complaint registration, bill payment, new connections, load alteration and access to the Consumer Grievances Redressal Forum (CGRF).

channels.label: Register an electricity complaint online (POWERLAK)
channels.source_name: POWERLAK - Complaint Registration
channels.note: Fetched and confirmed live: online form for outages, damaged lines and meter faults. Consumer number is not mandatory - only name and location are required.

channels.label: Public Distribution System (ration) grievances
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep (official portal) - helplines
channels.note: Published in the helpline block on the official UT portal homepage as "PDS Grievances: 1967".

channels.label: Ambulance
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep (official portal) - helplines
channels.note: National short code, published in the helpline block on the official UT portal homepage as "Ambulance: 102, 108" - 102 is also published as an alternate.

channels.label: Vigilance Department, UT of Lakshadweep
channels.source_name: Administration of Lakshadweep - Directory
channels.note: Listed in the official department contact directory of the Administration of UT of Lakshadweep. Handles complaints/irregularities in government operations; the directory does not label it as a dedicated public anti-corruption helpline, so present it as a departmental contact rather than a helpline.

channels.label: Lakshadweep Disaster Management Authority - emergency contacts directory
channels.source_name: Lakshadweep Disaster Management Authority - Emergency Contacts
channels.note: Official LDMA island-by-island emergency contacts table: Police Control, DM Control, Collector, Deputy Collectors, Indian Navy and Coast Guard, Health, Port Authority. Useful as a verified directory for island-level escalation.

channels.label: National Emergency Number (ERSS) - Police, Fire & Rescue, Health
channels.source_name: Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
channels.note: MHA's single pan-India emergency number: 'ONE INDIA ONE EMERGENCY NUMBER 112', a nationwide unified emergency response system. Works in every State/UT. Corroborated by india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 112 as the Integrated Helpline (ERSS) covering Police, Fire & Rescue and Health services.

channels.label: Fire Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed under 'Emergency Numbers' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: National Ambulance Service (NAS)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Ambulance Service (NAS)' under Emergency Numbers on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Women Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Women Helpline Toll free No. - 181' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed on india.gov.in as both 'Women Helpline Number' and 'Domestic Violence Helpline'.

channels.label: National Commission for Women (NCW) 24x7 Helpline
channels.source_name: National Commission for Women (NCW)
channels.note: NCW's own site states: 'Call the 24x7 NCW helpline at 14490 for immediate assistance and support', and lists 'NCW Women Helpline (14490)' under its Complaint Redressal cells. IMPORTANT: the india.gov.in helpline directory still lists 7827170170 as the 'National Commission for Women Helpline' - that number appears nowhere on ncw.gov.in (not even in raw HTML), so it appears stale and was deliberately omitted in favour of the department's own current number.

channels.label: Child Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Child Helpline Toll free No. - 1098' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed as 'Child Help Line' on india.gov.in.

channels.label: Elderline - National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)
channels.source_name: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Elder Helpline: 14567' on the Department of Social Justice & Empowerment's own Elderline site, which the ministry homepage links to as the 'National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)'. india.gov.in additionally lists a landline 011-20893999 alongside 14567 for the Senior Citizens Helpline.

channels.label: National Consumer Helpline (NCH)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Consumer Helpline (NCH)' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026). Note: the NCH portal consumerhelpline.gov.in could not be reached at time of research (DNS resolves to an NIC address but the host refused connections / returned 504), so only the number is cited here - not the NCH portal URL.

channels.label: Cyber Crime Helpline (online financial fraud reporting)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Confirmed on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal homepage banner (MHA / Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre - I4C), which reads: 'To report online financial fraud, call 1930' and 'register your complaint at cybercrime.gov.in'. Independently corroborated by the india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 1930 as the Cyber Crime Helpline.

channels.label: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal (file a cybercrime complaint)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Verified live. Ministry of Home Affairs portal for reporting cybercrime; supports anonymous reporting, women/children-related crime, financial fraud and other cybercrime, plus complaint tracking. Nationwide.

channels.label: CPGRAMS - Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System
channels.source_name: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, Government of India
channels.note: Verified live; this is the citizen-facing portal. The site states CPGRAMS is 'an online platform available to the citizens 24x7 to lodge their grievances to the public authorities on any subject related to service delivery... a single portal connected to all the Ministries/Departments of Government of India and States.' Supports tracking by registration ID and an appeal facility. Note: it does not cover RTI matters, subjudice/court matters, or religious matters.

channels.label: Central Vigilance Commission - lodge a corruption complaint
channels.source_name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), Government of India
channels.note: Verified live. CVC's Complaint Management System with a 'Citizen Login', complaint status tracking and a published complaint handling policy. Linked from cvc.gov.in as 'Lodge a complaint'. Covers corruption complaints against central government organisations.

channels.label: Relief Commissioner for Natural Calamities
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Road Accident Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).
